# CWE-268 — Privilege Chaining (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-268-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Vulnerable: read + export scopes together leak full credential table.
func ExportUsers(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	perms := c.GetStringSlice("scopes")
	hasRead, hasExport := false, false
	for _, p := range perms {
		if p == "read" {
			hasRead = true
		}
		if p == "export" {
			hasExport = true
		}
	}
	if hasRead && hasExport {
		rows, _ := db.Queryx("SELECT email, password_hash FROM users")
		defer rows.Close()
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"dump": rows})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
}
